text.title: JPA/Hibernate Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping read/write shape to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: DTO projection + .AsNoTracking equivalent (Hibernate: stateless / projection); add JOIN FETCH only if associations are required by the DTO
use JOIN FETCH or @EntityGraph inside the @Transactional service
single-entity load via narrow repository method
add @Version + optimistic locking; service catches OptimisticLockException and surfaces a domain error
write through narrow repository; cascade choices documented; @Transactional on the service write method

text.example: shape=read → is_list=true → use DTO projection + narrow repository method `findAllSummaries(Pageable)`; no entity loaded.
